reviews.review_description: These virtual tour apps do not work properly. I tried to watch 3 of them and they all freeze up every 5 to 10 seconds and are blurry watching the tours.  Not very happy with this bundle and would like to request a refund if I can.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. We’re sorry to hear that you experienced issues with the app. We’d like to let you know that we have improved the streaming system to provide a smoother experience.

Please make sure you have a stable internet connection.

reviews.review_description: This app accomplishes a new approach to travel experiences, bringing up close every scene, every conversation, communication D'Art is diving into together with you while browsing the beautiful Munich Christmas Market "Muenchner Christkindlmarkt". Curious about mulled wine made and served by a real winemaker, about Crambambuli, about the roasted royal nuts / macadamia and hot almonds roasted and coated with chilli, or about the German Christmas Specialty "Stollen", in particular Munich style, &c.? You're in the right place at the right time, Marienplatz in Munich at Xmas, you're in the right VR app, this very one. Have a lo of fun!
